message:
feat: add file locking to crew/ package to prevent race conditions (gt-m1aj1)

Copies the flock pattern from polecat/manager.go to crew/manager.go.
Adds lockCrew() using gofrs/flock and applies it to Add, Remove, Get,
Rename, and Start. Uses internal addLocked/getLocked variants in Start
to avoid lock re-entry. Rename locks both names in alphabetical order
to prevent deadlock.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
